title: Badge
description: Small status label or count. Not interactive by default.

keyboard: No keyboard interaction when badge is non-interactive.
aria: If badge conveys dynamic status, ensure the surrounding context includes accessible text.
If used as a count, avoid relying on color alone (e.g. include the number).

must: Badge content must remain readable in both themes.
should: Keep labels short (1–2 words) or numeric.
must_not: Do not use badges as primary calls to action (use buttons/links).

token_usage.notes: Use muted background for neutral badges.
Badge can use pill-like radius; if so, reference primitives.radius.pill.
